snippet.description:

Canal secundário: www.youtube.com/channel/UCUc3Jzg_eRBcvz5ZgELkDbw?sub_confirmation=1

Hoje vamos conferir um vídeo com um react e análise da nova música e trailer musical de Poppy Playtime 5! O novo trailer musical oficial de Poppy Playtime 5 conta um pouco mais da história do Protótipo e muitos segredos do passado do Experimento 1006! Escute a nova música de Poppy Playtime 5 Wrong Side Out com um novo trailer musical oficial da Mob Entertainment com CG5!

snippet.title: Luan Pereira, Panda - 10 Segundos (Clipe Oficial)
snippet.description:
LP PRODUÇÕES APRESENTA: 

Assista agora ao clipe oficial da música “10 SEGUNDOS”, interpretada por Luan Pereira e Panda.

🎧 Ouça nas principais plataformas de música:
https://SomLivre.lnk.to/10_SEGUNDOS

📲 Siga:
https://www.instagram.com/luanpereiracantor/
https://www.tiktok.com/@luanpereiracantor

🎵 10 Segundos
Composição Luan Pereira e Thales Lessa 

Conta 10 segundos no relógio aí…
Oi amor é que hoje eu tô meio sem tempo
Se eu não te responder é porque tá corrido
Hoje o trabalho tá acabando comigo
Beijo, tchau, saudade
Tá vendo?  
Quem se preocupa 
Não se preocupa em mandar uma mensagem
Quem ama tem tempo,
Quem quer tem vontade
Se não corresponde
É que não é de verdade
E não cai o dedo
Mandar uma mensagem
Pensasse assim antes 
De falar de saudade 
Se eu não mereci seu tempo,
Você não merece minha prioridade
Se eu não mereci seu tempo
Você não merece minha prioridade

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I’ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb
It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. 
I’d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do
I’d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

https://www.instagram.com/brunomars

https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] รักครูเท่าโลกเลย Love you teacher #LoveYouTeacherSeries
snippet.description:
ชีวิตอันเงียบสงบของ “ครูพบเมฆ” (เพิร์ธ ธนพนธ์) ครูประถมหน้าดุ ผู้ไม่ถูกชะตากับเด็ก กำลังจะพังทลาย เมื่อ “ครูโซลาร์” (แซนต้า พงศภัค) แฟนหนุ่มผู้สดใส ประสบอุบัติเหตุจนสมองรีเซ็ต กลับไปเป็นเด็กเจ็ดขวบในร่างผู้ใหญ่แบบวันเว้นวัน! สถานการณ์ยิ่งชวนปั่นป่วน เมื่อ “ครูจี้” (เค เลิศสิทธิชัย) ครูประถมคนใหม่ เพื่อนเก่าในวัยเด็กของพบเมฆ ปรากฏตัวขึ้นในฐานะครูไฟแรงครบเครื่อง มาคอยเปรียบเทียบให้ชีวิตครูพบเมฆดูแย่ จน “ครูสดชื่น” (แซมมี่ ซาแมนท่า) รักษาการผู้อำนวยการโรงเรียน อดเป็นห่วงไม่ได้ว่า ทั้งชีวิตครูและความรักของครูพบเมฆจะยังไปรอดหรือไม่ ความรักครั้งนี้จะพังไม่เป็นท่า หรือจะกลายเป็นบทเรียนที่แสนอบอุ่นที่สุดในชีวิตของครูคนหนึ่งกัน! 

          มาเอาใจช่วยพวกเขากันได้ใน “รักครูเท่าโลกเลย LOVE YOU TEACHER” ทุกวันเสาร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ดูทีวี ช่อง GMM25 | ดูย้อนหลัง แอป oneD ที่เดียว เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 14 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : จารุพัฒน์ กันนุลา

รายชื่อนักแสดง
เพิร์ธ ธนพนธ์ สุขุมพันธนาสาร รับบท พบเมฆ
แซนต้า พงศภัค อุดมโภชน์ รับบท โซลาร์
แซมมี่ ซาแมนท่า เมลานี่ โค้ทส์     รับบท  สดชื่น

snippet.title: Samba É Prece - Renan Oliveira Canta Jorge Aragão (Ao Vivo) [COMPLETO]
snippet.description:
Ouça em todas as plataformas de música: https://onerpm.link/sambaeprece 

O artista Renan Oliveira apresenta o projeto Samba É Prece, que chega para honrar a história viva de Jorge Aragão. Reconhecido por sua genialidade como compositor e intérprete, Aragão é a voz que une o Brasil em torno do cavaco e do tantã, e aqui ganha uma celebração à altura de sua grandeza.

Neste lançamento, Renan revisita clássicos do mestre, reafirmando que o samba é a nossa oração mais sincera. Uma homenagem feita por quem vive o samba para quem ama a nossa raiz e entende que a obra de Jorge Aragão é um patrimônio dos nossos corações.

O artista Renan Oliveira apresenta o projeto Samba É Prece, que chega para honrar a história viva de Jorge Aragão. Reconhecido por sua genialidade como compositor e intérprete, Aragão é a voz que une o Brasil em torno do cavaco e do tantã, e aqui ganha uma celebração à altura de sua grandeza.

Neste lançamento, Renan revisita clássicos do mestre, reafirmando que o samba é a nossa oração mais sincera. Uma homenagem feita por quem vive o samba para quem ama a nossa raiz e entende que a obra de Jorge Aragão é um patrimônio dos nossos corações.

snippet.title: Mc Sid - Rap News: Janeiro (Videoclipe Oficial)
snippet.description:
Rap News: Janeiro

Rap News é o Novo  Quadro! Que trás as notícias de um mês, no outro mês, enquanto a gente se prepara pra trazer as notícias pro próximo mês! E do jeito que o Brasil anda meu amigo!? Isso não vai acabar tão cedo, 
nem de uma vez! 

Então Deixa seu like, se inscreve e ativa o soninho pra todo mês vocês terem esse resumo maravilhoso para vocês!!!!


 Até por quê ficar fazendo Brasil de quem? toda hora, cansa de uma vez, mas de alguma forma, temos que falar sobre o que acontece nessa terra linda chamada Brasil! Onde homens bons e maus falam português :) 

Tem mês que parece ano. E é nesse ritmo que MC Sid estreia Rap News, novo quadro
mensal da Bendita Gravadora que transforma as principais notícias em rima, crítica e
reflexão.
O primeiro episódio, Rap News: Janeiro, chega no dia 24/02, à 00:00 no Spotify e às 12:00
no YouTube. No programa, Sid passa por temas como o caso do Banco Master, o caso
Epstein, as fraudes em apostas no futebol e o cachorro Orelha, entre outros acontecimentos
que marcaram o mês.
A ideia nasceu durante a gravação de Brasil de Quem, da necessidade de um espaço mais
frequente para acompanhar essa era caótica em tempo real. Se antes a pergunta era “Até
Quando?”
, agora ela ganha atualizações mensais.

as you turn around and say

still anticipating love
never hesitating
to become the fated ones
turning and returning
to some secret place to hide

Wrong Side Out Lyrics

I made us a home,
From what was once a prison.
So if you share my vision,
Thank me, dear, for paradise.

And in the hour of joy,
Don’t bite the hand that feeds you, child.
Or do I have to fix you?
‘Cuz once I do, you’ll never die.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

(A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.
A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.)

I gave us new life,
Through reanimation.
But you brought an outlier to my equation,
So shall we see what you look like?

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.
I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.
(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

You can’t burn down all that we are,
Or turn around,
This is the start of my immortal perfection.
And I’m your God.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

snippet.title: 100 Louvores Para Expulsar Todo Mal da Sua Vida - Top Gospel 2026 | Músicas Evangélicas Poderosas
snippet.description:
100 Louvores Para Expulsar Todo Mal da Sua Vida - Top Gospel 2026 | Músicas Evangélicas Poderosas 🙏✨

100 Louvores Para Expulsar Todo Mal da Sua Vida - Top Gospel 2026 | Músicas Evangélicas Poderosas é uma coletânea especial de louvores poderosos e músicas evangélicas mais tocadas, preparada para fortalecer sua fé e trazer proteção espiritual, paz e libertação através da presença de Deus. 🙏✨

Ouça estes louvores durante sua oração diária, antes de dormir, enquanto trabalha ou em momentos difíceis. Deixe que a Palavra de Deus através da música traga luz, proteção e esperança para sua vida e sua família.

✨ Que estes louvores tragam libertação e bênçãos para sua vida.
Que a presença de Deus encha seu coração com fé, paz e alegria.

🙏 Oração de Bênção

Senhor Deus Todo-Poderoso,
Entregamos nossas vidas em Tuas mãos neste momento.
Expulsa todo mal, toda tristeza e toda preocupação dos nossos corações.
Enche nossas vidas com Tua paz e Tua luz.
Abençoa cada pessoa que está ouvindo estes louvores agora.
Protege suas famílias e derrama Tuas bênçãos sobre seus lares.
Em nome de Jesus, Amém. ✨

✨ Bem-vindo ao canal Top Gospel

O canal Top Gospel foi criado para levar a Palavra de Deus através da música, compartilhando os louvores mais lindos e inspiradores para fortalecer sua fé todos os dias.

Nosso objetivo é levar paz, fé e esperança para pessoas do mundo inteiro através dos louvores. ✨

📌 Inscreva-se no canal Top Gospel

👍 Deixe seu LIKE para apoiar o canal
💬 Comente "Amém" se você crê no poder de Deus
📤 Compartilhe com sua família e amigos
🔔 Ative o sininho para receber novos louvores 
#100LouvoresParaExpulsarTodoMaldaSuaVida  #TopGospel2026  #MúsicasEvangélicasPoderosas #louvorea #adoração #musicaevagelica
